title: The War in Heaven
description: The Necrontyr and their C'tan masters wage a galaxy-shaping war against the Old Ones and their servant races.

title: The Fall of the Aeldari
description: Aeldari excess births Slaanesh, tears open the Eye of Terror, and ends an ancient galactic empire.

title: The Unification Wars
description: The Emperor conquers the techno-barbarian states of Terra and lays the foundation of the Imperium.

title: The Great Crusade Begins
description: The Legiones Astartes and rediscovered Primarchs carry the Imperial Truth across the stars.

title: Triumph at Ullanor
description: A vast Ork empire is broken and Horus is elevated to Warmaster before the assembled hosts.

title: The Horus Heresy
description: Half the Primarchs rebel, turning the Great Crusade into a civil war that scars humanity forever.

title: The Siege of Terra
description: The Warmaster's armies assault the Imperial Palace; Horus falls and the Emperor is interred.

title: The Great Scouring
description: Loyalist forces drive the traitor legions toward the Eye of Terror and divide the Legions into Chapters.

title: The War of the Beast
description: An Ork empire of unprecedented scale threatens Terra and exposes the complacency of the High Lords.

title: The Age of Apostasy
description: Goge Vandire's Reign of Blood nearly tears the Imperium apart from within.

title: The First Tyrannic War
description: Hive Fleet Behemoth strikes Macragge, revealing a devouring extragalactic threat.

title: The Thirteenth Black Crusade
description: Abaddon launches his greatest offensive and Cadia breaks beneath the assault.

title: The Great Rift Opens
description: The Cicatrix Maledictum splits the galaxy and isolates Imperium Nihilus in a long night.

title: The Indomitus Crusade
description: The returned Roboute Guilliman launches a vast crusade to stabilize a sundered Imperium.

title: The Fourth Tyrannic War
description: Hive Fleet Leviathan drives into the Segmentum Pacificus, forcing humanity into another vast war of survival.
